title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
